title: Comms FR-CA tell-detector return (Phase 4)
description: Validates the FR-CA tell-detector panel's return (_core/primitives/comms-panels.md Panel 2; SPEC-workflow-phases-2-5.md § 4c). One read-only critic reads the post-redaction FR-CA draft and flags the signatures of English-calque French (Bill 96 authenticity). FLAG-only and advisory: it never blocks and never rewrites — tells[] surface to the operator above the acknowledgment gate; the human decides. additionalProperties:false at every level; no replacement_text, no blocking. Note: the panel returns null (not this shape) when no FR-CA language is enabled for the engagement; this schema validates the non-null case.

tells.description: Every English-calque tell found in the FR-CA draft. Empty array means natively-reading French — report [], never omit the property.

category.description: anglicism = English loanword/calque where a QC-French term exists; svo-rigidity = English subject-verb-object order imposed on French; register-slip = formality drift away from the C07 speaker register; vous-tu-mixing = inconsistent second-person address within one artifact.

excerpt.description: The offending French text, quoted from the draft. State the observation; never propose the corrected phrasing (FLAG-only).

location.description: Where in the draft the tell appears.
